problem id: 8e7952cc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  11100101 -> 10100010
  00000100 -> 00000000
  00111000 -> 00000000
  11011101 -> 10100110
  01001111 -> 10100010
  10010101 -> 10000000
  10000010 -> 01000000

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 00000100
